description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single job named test_binder that runs in the default test stage using the ubuntu:latest Docker image and a docker:dind service. The job installs docker.io and python3-pip via apt, installs jupyter-repo2docker with pip3, sets CONTAINER_NAME to $CI_REGISTRY/$CI_PROJECT_PATH and CONTAINER_TAG to the first 10 characters of $CI_COMMIT_SHA, then runs jupyter-repo2docker --debug --user-name username --user-id 1000 --no-run --image-name "${CONTAINER_NAME}:${CONTAINER_TAG}" "${CI_PROJECT_URL}". Afterwards it logs into the GitLab registry with docker login using the gitlab-ci-token and $CI_BUILD_TOKEN, and pushes the built image "${CONTAINER_NAME}:${CONTAINER_TAG}". Define variables DOCKER_DRIVER=overlay2 and DOCKER_HOST=tcp://docker:2375 for the Docker daemon.
